archive_data.question_text: As per India Skills Report 2022, which Indian state got the first rank with the most employable talent?

explanation.english: According to the India Skills Report 2022, Maharashtra secured the first rank among Indian states for having the most employable talent.
explanation.tanglish: India Skills Report 2022 anusaram, athigama velaikku thaguthiulla thirunar kalvi petra ratchiyil Maharashtra state mudhal idathai eduthu ulladhu.

archive_data.question_text: Baishagu is celebrated in which of the following states?

explanation.english: Baishagu is a traditional spring festival celebrated by the Bodo people in the state of Assam, marking the beginning of the new year.
explanation.tanglish: Baishagu endradhu Assam ratchiyil Bodo samuda makkal varudapirappai kondnadakkum malligai maanudamana puthu varusha vizha.

archive_data.question_text: What do you mean by 'cant' in kabaddi?

options.text: A player in whose court a raid is made
A special point is given to an opponent
A player who enters the court

explanation.english: In kabaddi, 'cant' refers to the continuous rhythmic chanting of the word 'kabaddi' by the raider, which must be maintained without taking a breath during the raid.
explanation.tanglish: Kabaddi vilayattil 'cant' endradhu raider niruthatha uchchilai pidithu 'kabaddi' endra padathai thirumbavum thirumbavum solli thodarndhu sendhu kalikkirarudan porundiyadhu.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following is the oldest atomic power plant of India?

explanation.english: Tarapur Atomic Power Station located in Maharashtra is the oldest nuclear power plant in India, which was commissioned in the year 1969.
explanation.tanglish: Maharashtra ratchiyil ulla Tarapur paramaana oviyam indiavin mudhalaana nuclear power plant, adhu 1969 aam aandum arambikkappattadhu.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following is NOT included in Article 19 of the Constitution of India?

options.text: To reside and settle in any part of India
To practice any profession or occupation
To prohibit ineligibility in respect of employment

explanation.english: Article 19 guarantees six fundamental freedoms including speech, assembly, association, movement, residence, and profession. Employment eligibility is covered under Article 16, not Article 19.
explanation.tanglish: Article 19 pechchirithal, kootta-chindanai, sangga organisaasu, movement, vasam matrum tozhil swaathanthiramkalai uruthi paduthugiradhu. Tozhil thakuthi Article 16 il ulladhu, Article 19 il illai.

archive_data.question_text: Where is the secretariat of the Goods and Services Tax Council located?

explanation.english: The secretariat of the Goods and Services Tax (GST) Council is located in New Delhi.
explanation.tanglish: Goods and Services Tax Council enra amaipin seyalaga puthukottaiyil (New Delhi) than amainthu ulladhu.

archive_data.question_text: Some qualities of Samudragupta are shown on coins, such as on one of the coins he is shown playing the _________.

explanation.english: Samudragupta, the great Gupta emperor, is depicted playing the veena (a stringed musical instrument) on his coins, which highlights his patronage of music and arts.
explanation.tanglish: Perum Gupta samrarat Samudragupta than sikkalil vaasiththa padi kaattappadukira veenai vaasikkira padi ullar, adhu avarin isai matrum kalaigondu anbanai kattugiradhu.
